title: ATTENTION! Lihkg is not a reliable source!

replies.msg:
Hello. Welcome to LIHKG.
LIHKG is one of the major Internet forums of Hong Kong. It is also one of the information hub of the protest.

However, please be aware that LIHKG is not a reliable source of information. Why?

1) Presence of state-controlled accounts and bots

LIHKG accounts are not easy to get, but they are not hard to get also. The government can easily generate ISP emails in bulk and make an army.

These accounts (aka 50cents) might be obvious, but they also might not. They can pretend to be one of the protestor and try to do some spin control and framing.

This would get worse especially with the World sub board. The inherent difficulty of the Cantonese language and the unique, isolated LIHKG culture made the cost to infiltrate LIHKG relatively high. However, as the World sub board is a new place designed for new comers and uses English and other languages that are more accessible ble, manipulating contents on this sub board is way easier.


2) Loose regulations on contents

Our mods (admins) do not interfere with user contents actively. Usually they remove posts that contains nudity or personal information only. ( Though starting from a recent update they are trying to take down fake news.)

This would give room for misinformation to grow and spread. Not only fake news but also political spin controls, promoting Defeatism, polarising contents, and much much more.



Doubt and think about every post and every comment. By saying this I am not discrediting LIHKG. Instead, I love this place and don’t want it to become a hub for misinformation and I don’t want it to be perceived as such also. When browsing LIHKG, remember to think critically!

push

always good to actually process the information received
